items.title: Tags and release points: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? A tag is a read-only branch that automatically follows new commits and appears on every remote.

feedback.correct: Correct. Treat a tag as a named pointer to one chosen object, verify its target, and publish or protect it according to project policy.
